race.comment: DRAKAINA (7) comes in first-up and without a trial, just like she did when winning the Jungle Mist Classic during The Pinnacles. Pike's booking means she's ready to fire first-up and she continues to raise the bar every time she comes back to the races. Can storm over the top to score fresh again. SNITZALATTE (9) couldn't bring up the hat-trick last start when beaten 0.8L when favourite in an Open 3YO race. She drops 6.5kg today and while this is tougher, her recent figures suggest she's up to the grade. Makes plenty of appeal with no weight on her back. PETULA (4) was strong in The Joey and has been back to the trials since. She's likely to get back from the wide draw but she looks well placed back to this level and she can finish off strongly from the back. SIR DREAMALOT (11) is racing in good order and can't be left out of calculations. EARTHSTORM (8) has to be included on her recent form.
